ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model to track different iterations */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., Convolutional, Recurrent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the layer */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the input tensor for the layer */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the output tensor for the layer */,
  "num_parameters" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression result */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the result belongs to */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Sparsity of the layer after compression */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the layer */,
  "compressed_size" INTEGER /* Compressed size of the layer */,
  "actual_size" INTEGER /* Actual size of the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the compression result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the compression result */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression technique used */,
  "compression_time" REAL /* Time taken to compress the layer */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Impact on the model performance after compression */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model after compression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_results_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_results_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES compression_techniques ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the technique was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the technique */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Typical performance impact of the technique */,
  "accuracy_impact" TEXT /* Typical accuracy impact of the technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
